nasb.text: And they did not depart from the commandment of the king to the priests and Levites in any manner or concerning the storehouses.

esv.text: And they did not turn aside from what the king had commanded the priests and Levites concerning any matter and concerning the treasuries.

cnv.text: 王對祭司和利未人所吩咐的，無論是甚麼事務，或是有關庫房的事，他們都沒有違抗。

ccb.text: 他们没有违背大卫王就库房等工作对祭司和利未人的吩咐。
